zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda De Valoignes於1135年出生在英國素福爾可普洛梅斯蓋特時，她的父親Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham36歲，母親Helewise de Valenis25歲。她於大約1155年與Hervey Walter在英國諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1226年在英國英格蘭諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda De Valoignes于1135年出生在英国素福爾可普洛梅斯蓋特时，她的父亲Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham36岁，母亲Helewise de Valenis25岁。她于大约1155年与Hervey Walter在英国諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1226年在英国英格兰諾福爾可韋斯特 德雷哈姆享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda De Valoignes was born in 1135, in Plomesgate, Suffolk, England, her father, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, was 36 and her mother, Helewise de Valenis, was 25. She married Hervey Walter about 1155, in West Dereham, Norfolk, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1226, in West Dereham, Norfolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda De Valoignes est née en 1135, à Plomesgate, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Helewise de Valenis, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Hervey Walter environ 1155, à West Dereham, Norfolk, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1226, à West Dereham, Norfolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 91 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda De Valoignesが1135年にイギリススフォルクプロメスガトで生まれた時，父Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parhamは36歳，母Helewise de Valenisは25歳であった。約1155年にイギリスノーフォルクウエスト デレハムでHervey Walterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子の親であった。彼女は1226年にイギリスイギリスノーフォルクウエスト デレハムで91歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda De Valoignes(이)가 1135년 영국 수폴크 플롬스가트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Helewise de Valenis(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1155년 영국 노르폴크 웨스트 더함에서 Hervey Walter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 노르폴크 웨스트 더함에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda De Valoignes nasceu em 1135, em Plomesgate, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Helewise de Valenis, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Hervey Walter aproximadamente 1155, em West Dereham, Norfolk, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda De Valoignes родилась в 1135 г. в местности пломесгэит, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Theobald de Valoignes Lord of Parham было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Helewise de Valenis, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hervey Walter около 1155 г. в местности вест дирэам, норфолк, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1226 г. в местности вест дирэам, норфолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 91 год.
